# AudioObjectHasProperty(_:_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Audio ](/documentation/coreaudio)

- [ AudioObjectHasProperty(_:_:) ](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjecthasproperty(_:_:))

-  AudioObjectHasProperty(_:_:) 

Function# AudioObjectHasProperty(_:_:)

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.4+

```
func AudioObjectHasProperty(
    _ inObjectID: AudioObjectID,
    _ inAddress: UnsafePointer<AudioObjectPropertyAddress>
) -> Bool
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjecthasproperty(_:_:)#parameters)

`inObjectID`The AudioObject to query.

`inAddress`An AudioObjectPropertyAddress indicating which property is being queried.

## [Return Value](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjecthasproperty(_:_:)#return-value)

A Boolean indicating whether or not the AudioObject has the given property.

## [Discussion](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjecthasproperty(_:_:)#discussion)

Queries an AudioObject about whether or not it has the given property.
